name: Almond Crescents
recipeIngredient: 1 cup QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Beat margarine and powdered sugar together until fluffy.
3. Stir in almond extract or vanilla extract.
4. Mix in flour and salt.
5. Fold in oats and chopped almonds.
6. Using a level measuring tablespoon, shape dough into crescents on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 14-17 minutes or until bottoms are light golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and transfer to a wire rack.
9. Sprinkle additional powdered sugar generously over warm cookies.
10. Allow cookies to cool completely.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
